{{CargoRelic
|name=Radiance of May
|class_id=20641
|rank=Green
|affct=ART
|source=
|description=The fifth rule of natural circulation: A gentle breeze and lush greenery are the prelude to busy farming in early summer. Let us follow the rhythm of the seasons, diligently cultivate, and look forward to a fruitful autumn!
|fame=14
|art=34
|fth=15
|civ=13
|tech=14
|ss1=Snail Leadership +2<br>Per 10 Lucky Star gained, Snail RUSH +1<br>Lucky Star Gained: 2400/2400
|ss2=Snail Leadership +4<br>Per 10 Lucky Star gained, Snail RUSH +2<br>Lucky Star Gained: 2400/2400
|ss3=Snail Leadership +6<br>Per 10 Lucky Star gained, Snail RUSH +3<br>Lucky Star Gained: 2400/2400
|ss4=Snail Leadership +6<br>Per 10 Lucky Star gained, Snail RUSH +3<br>Lucky Star Gained: 2400/2400
|ss7=Snail Leadership +6<br>Per 10 Lucky Star gained, Snail RUSH +3<br>Lucky Star Gained: 2400/2400<br> (Awakened)
}}
